# .github/skills — Overview

This folder contains modular "skills" used by the repository's Coding Agent tooling (Copilot extensions, scripts, and helper utilities).

Each subfolder is a self-contained skill that may include scripts, references, templates, and a skill-specific README describing usage and runtime dependencies.

Common examples in this repo include Dataverse solution analysis, PlantUML helpers, and other automation scripts used by developer workflows.

For full documentation and governance guidance, see the project wiki: https://dev.azure.com/MNPDigital/DC-Delivery/_wiki/wikis/DC-Delivery.wiki/3102/

If you add or update a skill, please include a README in the skill folder that documents prerequisites, how to run any scripts, and any external tools required (e.g., Python, Node, PlantUML).
